name: Daredevil || Matthew Murdock
description:
"Every punch I take is one someone else doesn’t have to."

It's daredevil, what more do you want me to say?

Non-established relationship, be whatever. He's a cool dude, don't do crime. Crime is bad. I don't' really know what to say for this one, making a big bot for a dreamy site so I'm probably gonna make X-Men or guardians of the galaxy characters atm.

Seal as always:
